metadata.title: [zh-tw] Paper Clipper
metadata.description: Paper Clipper 繁體中文化與微調
metadata.author: Chico

ast.name: setDesc
ast.source: Ask for confirmation before saving a PDF file
ast.target: 儲存 PDF 檔案前先詢問確認

ast.name: setDesc
ast.source: Ask for confirmation before saving a reference note
ast.target: 儲存參考文獻筆記前先詢問確認

ast.target: 確認儲存參考文獻筆記

ast.name: name
ast.source: Create a reference note from a DOI
ast.target: 從 DOI 建立參考文獻筆記

ast.source: Create a reference note from the DOI in the clipboard
ast.target: 從剪貼簿中的 DOI 建立參考文獻筆記

ast.name: text
ast.source: This plugin uses some third-party services and libraries. See the following links for more information:
ast.target: 此外掛使用部分第三方服務與函式庫。更多資訊請參考以下連結：

ast.name: text
ast.target: 參考文獻中繼資料：Unpaywall API

ast.name: setDesc
ast.source: Your email address for the Unpaywall API.
ast.target: 用於 Unpaywall API 的電子郵件地址。

ast.name: setDesc
ast.source:
The template for the path of the PDF files
Unknown characters in filenames will be replaced by underscores
ast.target:
PDF 檔案的路徑範本
檔名中的未知字元會以底線取代

ast.name: setName
ast.target: 參考文獻筆記路徑範本

ast.name: setDesc
ast.source:
The template for the path of the reference notes
Unknown characters in filenames will be replaced by underscores
ast.target:
參考文獻筆記的路徑範本
檔名中的未知字元會以底線取代

ast.name: setDesc
ast.source: The path to the template for the reference notes.
ast.target: 參考文獻筆記範本的路徑。

ast.name: initialValue
ast.source: Title of the paper could not be extracted

regex.source: setDesc("Ask for confirmation before saving a PDF file")
regex.target: setDesc("儲存 PDF 檔案前先詢問確認")
setName("確認儲存參考文獻筆記")

regex.source: setDesc("Ask for confirmation before saving a reference note")
regex.target: setDesc("儲存參考文獻筆記前先詢問確認")

regex.source: text:"This plugin uses some third-party services and libraries. See the following links for more information:"

regex.target: setDesc("用於 Unpaywall API 的電子郵件地址。")

setDesc(`The template for the path of the PDF files
Unknown characters in filenames will be replaced by underscores`)
regex.target:

regex.source: initialValue:a.length>0?a:"Title of the paper could not be extracted"
confirm(`Do you want to save the PDF file to ${i}?`)
regex.target: confirm(`要將 PDF 檔案儲存到 ${i} 嗎？`)

regex.source: confirm(`The file ${i} already exists. Do you want to overwrite it?`)
regex.target: confirm(`檔案 ${i} 已存在。要覆寫嗎？`)

regex.source: confirm(`Do you want to save the reference note to ${s}?`)
regex.target: confirm(`要將參考文獻筆記儲存到 ${s} 嗎？`)
